meta.title: BiuBiu Tools - Web3 & Developer Utilities
meta.description: A collection of powerful web tools for blockchain, developer, and everyday utilities. Free, fast, and privacy-focused.
hero.description: Simplify and secure repetitive on-chain tasks.
featured.title: Featured Tools
featured.revoke.name: Revoke Approvals
featured.revoke.description: Find every contract that can still move your tokens and NFTs, then shut off the risky unlimited approvals. ERC-20, ERC-721/1155 and Permit2 across many chains — public RPC, batch revoke in one signature.
featured.balanceRadar.name: Balance Radar
featured.balanceRadar.description: Bulk-check balances for thousands of addresses across multiple chains and tokens—export your report in minutes.
featured.balanceRadar.feature1Desc: Support for Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, and more
featured.tokenSender.name: Token Sender
featured.tokenSender.description: Batch-send a coin or ERC20 to thousands of addresses from your own passkey wallet — Safe MultiSend, one signature per batch.
featured.walletGenerator.name: Wallet Generator
featured.walletGenerator.description: Turn one secret passphrase into a whole batch of wallets—deterministic and repeatable. Export an xpub QR and sign air-gapped, fully offline.
featured.forever.name: Capsule
featured.forever.description: Write an encrypted note that lives on-chain forever—readable only by you. Or seal a time capsule even you can't open until a future date.
featured.eventScanner.name: Event Scanner
featured.eventScanner.description: Index and decode any contract's events on any EVM chain. Proxy-aware, human-friendly filters, resumable scans saved to your browser with CSV/JSON export.
featured.walletSweep.name: Wallet Sweep
featured.walletSweep.description: Drain native coin + ERC20 from many wallets into one using EIP-7702. A relay wallet you fund does the upgrade and sweep — no passkey, no login.
coming.title: More Tools Coming
coming.description: We're building more powerful utilities for developers and blockchain enthusiasts.
coming.subtitle: Tools in development
coming.tools.tokenSender.name: Token Sender
coming.tools.tokenSender.desc: Batch transfer tokens to multiple addresses
coming.tools.walletSweep.name: Wallet Sweep
coming.tools.walletSweep.desc: Consolidate assets from multiple wallets into one
coming.tools.eventScanner.name: Event Scanner
coming.tools.eventScanner.desc: Scan and decode smart contract events
coming.tools.contractCaller.name: Contract Caller
coming.tools.contractCaller.desc: Interact with any contract without coding
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search tools... Batch Transfer, Token Query
settings.title: Settings
settings.theme.title: Theme
settings.helpTranslate.hint: {key} + Click any text to edit on GitHub
error.404.title: Page Not Found
error.404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
error.generic.title: Something Went Wrong
error.generic.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
featured.chainExplorer.name: Chain Explorer
featured.chainExplorer.description: Browse 800+ blockchain networks. Find RPC endpoints, block explorers, and network details instantly.
featured.contractDeployer.name: Contract Deployer
featured.contractDeployer.description: Deploy Foundry contracts via CREATE2 with deterministic addresses. Passkey signing, contract verification, and full deployment history.
featured.contractCaller.name: Contract Caller
featured.contractCaller.description: Read and write any smart contract from its ABI — with human-friendly inputs, proxy support, atomic batches, and on-chain chained calls.
featured.pumpSignal.name: Pump Signal Scanner
featured.pumpSignal.description: Real-time Binance pump signal detection. Monitor volume spikes and price surges as they happen.
featured.btcUpdown.name: BTC Up/Down Dashboard
featured.btcUpdown.description: Real-time visualization of the Polymarket BTC 5-min prediction strategy. Simulation only, no real money involved.
pumpSignal.title: Binance Pump Signal Scanner
pumpSignal.description: Real-time pump signal detection on Binance. Monitor volume spikes and price surges as they happen.
pumpSignal.noEventsDesc: Pump signals will appear here in real-time once detected.
pumpSignal.telegramBotDesc: Follow @BinancePumpSignalScannerBot for confirmed signal notifications only.
auth.login.title: Sign In
auth.login.description: Select a passkey saved on this device to sign in. Your identity lives in your passkey — no passwords, no emails.
auth.login.switch: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.connect.title: Connect Wallet
auth.connect.subtitle: Only smart contract wallets are supported — including EOAs upgraded via EIP-7702.
auth.connect.builtinOnly: This tool needs the built-in biubiu wallet (passkey).
auth.connect.biubiuDesc: Passkey + smart account. No extension or seed phrase.
auth.connect.walletpairHint: Scan this QR code with your WalletPair-compatible wallet, then verify the code matches on both screens.
auth.connect.notSmartAccount: This address is a plain EOA. BiuBiu only supports smart contract wallets, or EOAs upgraded via EIP-7702.
auth.register.title: Create Account
auth.register.description: Choose a name for your account. This name will be publicly visible and tied to your passkey.
auth.register.nameHint: This will be your public identity. Choose carefully — it cannot be changed.
auth.risk.title: Important — Read Before Continuing
auth.risk.heading: No Recovery. No Exceptions.
auth.risk.item1: Your passkey is the only way to access this account. There is no password, no email, and no backup.
auth.risk.item2: If you lose your device or delete the passkey, your account is permanently inaccessible. No one — including us — can recover it.
auth.risk.item3: Consider syncing your passkey via iCloud Keychain, Google Password Manager, or a hardware security key for redundancy.
auth.browser.title: Unsupported Browser
auth.browser.heading: Browser Not Supported
auth.browser.detected: You are using {browser}, which has known compatibility issues with passkey signing.
auth.browser.item1: Transactions may fail with signature errors, making your funds inaccessible.
auth.browser.item2: Please switch to a supported browser before creating an account or depositing funds.
auth.browser.depositWarn: Warning: You are using {browser}. Transactions may fail. Please use Chrome, Safari, or Edge.
auth.risk.item4: This is a self-custody wallet. BiuBiu Tools has no access to your funds and cannot recover, reverse, or refund any transaction. You are solely responsible for all assets in this wallet.
auth.risk.accept: I understand that losing my passkey means losing this account forever, with no possibility of recovery. I accept full responsibility for my funds.
auth.logoutConfirm: Your passkey stays on this device — you can sign back in anytime.
auth.profile.title: Profile
auth.profile.name: Account Name
auth.profile.walletWarning: Losing your passkey means losing access to this wallet. No recovery possible.
auth.wallet.noBalance: No assets yet — deposit to get started
auth.wallet.depositHint: Only send assets on supported networks shown above. Sending on unsupported networks may result in permanent loss.
auth.send.title: Send
auth.send.needNativeGas: Insufficient gas. Please deposit {token} on {chain} to this wallet for transaction fees.
auth.uploadRetry.title: Save to Server
auth.uploadRetry.description: Your passkey was created successfully, but saving to the server failed. Please retry — your account won't be complete until this succeeds.
sub.transferDesc: Transfer your membership NFT to another address. The recipient will become the new owner.
sub.priceNote: Price includes 3% buffer for price fluctuation. Excess ETH is auto-refunded.
sub.priceError: Failed to load pricing. Please try again.
sub.upgradeDesc: Zero tool fees — only pay network gas
sub.notDeployed: The subscription contract has not been deployed to Arbitrum yet. Deploy it first to enable subscriptions.
profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.description: View user profile and wallet information
profilePage.invalidLinkDesc: This profile link is invalid or has been corrupted.

widgets.networkPicker.subtitle: Search any EVM chain by name or chain ID.

widgets.addNetwork.name: Network Name
widgets.addNetwork.errorChainId: Chain ID must be a positive number
widgets.addNetwork.errorRpcs: At least one valid RPC URL is required
widgets.addNetwork.errorDuplicate: A network with this Chain ID already exists
scanQr.title: Scan QR Code
scanQr.notSupported: QR detection not supported in this browser

sub.waive.ctaHint: Confirm it’s really you with your passkey to waive this fee.
sub.waive.notMember: Upgrade to Pro to waive this service fee.
sub.waive.notLoggedIn: Log in with your Pro account to waive this service fee.
sub.waive.errNotMember: This account is not a Pro member.
sub.waive.errWrongCredential: Passkey does not match the logged-in account.
sub.waive.errUnsupported: This device does not support passkeys.

funding.title: Gas account
funding.intro: Gas on this network is paid from your gas account. Fund it or get free activation.
funding.freeHint: Sponsored from the bundler treasury — for new accounts.
funding.selfFundHint: Send the native coin to your gas account address below.
funding.denial.default: Free activation unavailable. Please fund it yourself.
funding.denial.nonceExceeded: Free activation is only for new accounts. Please fund it yourself.
funding.denial.treasuryDepleted: Sponsorship is temporarily unavailable. Please fund it yourself.
funding.denial.balanceTooLow: Wallet ineligible for sponsorship. Please fund it yourself.
funding.denial.noPasskey: No passkey registered. Please fund it yourself.
funding.denial.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please fund it yourself or try later.
